title: The role of knowledge management in onboarding software testing professionals
author: Ferreira de Souza, Érica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: A data extraction form was created to gather all relevant data from the identified studies and manage the selection process in this systematic literature review. Some of the main information presented in this form was followed by a protocol, and answers to research questions. This catalog helps us in the data extraction and synthesis procedures and may be used by potentially interested, for example, for updating or replication.
